q: Describe a time when you gave advice to others
cue_card: And explain how you felt after giving it
examiner_note: Kể về tình huống cụ thể và kết quả của lời khuyên.

samples.band7: I gave advice to my best friend when she was struggling with her university choice. I told her to follow her passion instead of just choosing a major that would lead to a high-paying job. I gave her this advice because I wanted her to be happy in the future. I felt relieved when she finally made a decision that she was excited about.
samples.band8: I remember offering some guidance to my best friend when she was at a crossroads regarding her academic path. I encouraged her to prioritize her genuine interests over societal expectations. I felt it was important to provide a supportive perspective during such a stressful time. After our conversation, I felt a sense of fulfillment seeing her regain her confidence and choose a direction that truly resonated with her values.
samples.band9: A notable occasion when I provided counsel was to my close friend who was grappling with a difficult career transition. I advised her to adopt a more holistic approach, weighing personal satisfaction against professional ambition. I felt compelled to share my insights because I value her long-term well-being. Ultimately, seeing her navigate the challenge with a renewed sense of clarity was incredibly rewarding for me, as it strengthened our bond and validated the importance of mutual support.

v.meaning: đứng trước những ngã rẽ (lựa chọn khó)
v.example: He's at a crossroads in his career.
The school takes a holistic approach to education.
The city is grappling with a housing crisis.

topic: Describe a time when you gave advice to others
